summary: Dream List bug fixes verified - both backend and frontend working correctly. Bug 1: GET /api/iso/dreamlist endpoint returns WISHLIST items (new dedicated endpoint at honeypot.py line 118). Bug 2: Value of Dream Records shows $0 when empty (valuation/dreamlist endpoint returns {total_value: 0, valued_count: 0, total_count: 0} when no items). All 10 backend tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/iso/dreamlist endpoint (honeypot.py lines 118-124) correctly queries {status: 'WISHLIST'} to return Dream List items
GET /api/iso (honeypot.py line 108) correctly excludes WISHLIST items with {status: {$ne: 'WISHLIST'}}
POST /api/iso (honeypot.py lines 83-104) creates items with status=WISHLIST by default for dream list
GET /api/valuation/dreamlist (valuation.py lines 140-165) returns {total_value: 0, valued_count: 0, total_count: 0} when dream list is empty (safeguard at lines 143-146)
Frontend CollectionPage.js line 123 now fetches from /api/iso/dreamlist (not /api/iso) for Dream List items
Frontend CollectionPage.js line 417 shows Value of Dream Records with ${(dreamlistValue?.total_value || 0)} which correctly displays $0 when empty
DreamDebtHeader component (lines 678-730) shows 'Your dreams are currently free' message when itemCount is 0

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Collection page loads, Dream List tab functional, correct API calls)

seed_data_creation: Test created/deleted WISHLIST items during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dream List bug fixes fully verified. The root cause was GET /api/iso using {$ne: 'WISHLIST'} while frontend was filtering for status === 'WISHLIST' from that response. Fix: dedicated /api/iso/dreamlist endpoint. Demo user has 3 records in collection, 0 in Dream List. The 'Value of Dream Records' toggle only appears when collection has value (currently demo user may not have valued records). The DreamDebtHeader in Dream List tab correctly shows $0.00 or 'free' message when empty.

features_tested.dreamlist_returns_list: PASS - Returns array of WISHLIST items
features_tested.create_wishlist_item: PASS - POST /api/iso with status=WISHLIST creates Dream List item
features_tested.created_item_in_dreamlist: PASS - Created WISHLIST item appears in /api/iso/dreamlist
features_tested.valuation_zero_when_empty: PASS - Returns total_value=0 when dream list is empty
features_tested.delete_wishlist_item: PASS - DELETE /api/iso/{id} removes Dream List item
features_tested.iso_excludes_wishlist: PASS - GET /api/iso does NOT return WISHLIST items
features_tested.cleanup_test_items: PASS - All TEST_ prefixed items cleaned up
features_tested.frontend_collection_loads: PASS - Collection page loads with tabs visible
features_tested.frontend_dreamlist_tab_count: PASS - Dream List tab shows correct count (0)
